overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The character ascends a monumental staircase, walks along busy commercial sidewalks, runs through dense traffic, and enters a plaza area. The setting features towering glass buildings, holographic billboards, palm trees, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with monumental staircase and graffiti walls

events.description: camera rises from low angle to plaza level revealing the staircase ahead
begins ascending the wide concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic commercial plaza and ascending a wide concrete staircase with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with green glass facade and white 02 numbering
orange safety railings along elevated walkways
large curved digital screen displaying purple and yellow holographic advertisement
wide monumental staircase with multiple flights leading upward
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle view of a futuristic green tower marked 02, then transitions to plaza level. The character walks toward and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by graffiti-covered walls and orange railings, with a large digital billboard visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with palm trees and storefronts

events.description: emerges from staircase onto upper level street with open sky
vehicles pass by on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a busy sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing pedestrians and storefronts

entered.detail: modern building with green neon softsys signage
yellow-railed elevated walkway crossing above the street
large digital advertisement with red BE SHACK text
row of palm trees along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character emerges onto a sunlit commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees. The softsys building stands on the left while a yellow pedestrian overpass spans the street ahead. The character walks past moderate crowds with traffic moving on the adjacent road.

events.description: construction scaffolding and materials appear on the right side
turns right toward the street to cross through traffic

agents.ego_description: walking past construction materials then turning to run across the multi-lane street through moving traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan moving through the intersection

entered.detail: orange metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks
construction materials and wooden pallets stacked on the sidewalk
industrial gate painted purple with graffiti art
scattered litter and debris along the building base

segments.scene_description: The character walks past an active construction zone with orange scaffolding and stacked materials on the right. After passing a purple gated entrance, the character turns toward the street and begins running through dense traffic, weaving between moving vehicles.

events.description: crosses the final lane and enters the open plaza area
slows from running to walking as approaching the parked vehicle

agents.ego_description: running through the final traffic lanes then walking into a plaza toward a parked green vintage car

entered.detail: green retro-futuristic sedan with white roof and red tail fins
open paved plaza with geometric concrete patterns
contemporary building with glass facade and covered walkways

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the busy street, the character enters a quieter open plaza with concrete paving. A distinctive green vintage car with white roof is parked ahead. The character slows to a walk while approaching the vehicle, with modern buildings and concrete planters visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the gritty base of a futuristic tower up into a bright, bustling commercial district. It begins with a low-angle view of a green tower marked 02 before descending to the plaza level, where the character approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by graffiti-covered walls and orange railings. As the character climbs past a large digital billboard, the enclosed feel of the stairs gives way to an open, sunlit environment. The scene then expands onto a commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and the softsys building, moving past moderate crowds toward a yellow pedestrian overpass spanning a road of active traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered industrial construction zone into a serene, open urban plaza. It begins with the character walking past orange scaffolding and stacked materials, moving through a purple gated entrance before turning toward the street. As the character enters the roadway, the pace quickens into a run, weaving through a dense flow of futuristic traffic. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the busy street and enters a quieter area of concrete paving and modern buildings. Finally, the movement slows to a walk as the camera approaches a distinctive green vintage car with a white roof parked among concrete planters.
